Lyrics.text:
Moa mba tazanao ve
'Ry havoana iry
Misy hazo fijaliana?
Moa tsy fantatrao ve
F a io re no Kalvary,
Nihomboan'Ilay Fitiavana?

Lyrics.label: Refrain
Lyrics.text:
O! tazano hatrizao ka e keo
Izy mba ho Mpamonjy anao
Aza tananao koa fa omeo
Manontolo anio ny fonao !

N deha hiakatra eo
Hanakaiky kokoa
Ka handre ilay feo mitoreo:
"Andriamanitra ô!
O! nafoinao tokoa
Ity zana kao, Ô! Ray, jereo!"

Moa tsy fantatrao ve
Fa nitsory ny ra
Noho ny fahotana marobe?
O! ry n amako ô!
Aoka re tsy handa
Ity antsom-pitia leh ibe!
Refrain (farany)
Na dia eso izao no hanjo,
Hiaretana an -dalana ety
Fa indro lova izay tsy ho lo
Hovantanina raha mby ery
